metadata.description: Two screenType profiles score within 8 of each other and the documented tie-break (jobMapStages, then density) does not separate them. The step must go to `unresolved` with the tied candidates, not a guess.
metadata.inputProvenance: Synthetic: a hybrid monitor/browse step engineered to trigger the near-tie branch in ai-pattern-selection-instructions.md step 1.

unresolved.reason: top two screenType scores within 8 (collection 82 vs dashboard 78); tie-break exhausted: jobMapStages sets differ from both, density matches both. Escalating rather than guessing.
